input.heading: Revocable transfers
input.text_preview: (a) In general The value of the gross estate shall include the value of all property— (1) Transfers after June 22, 1936 To the extent of any interest therein of which the decedent has at any time made a transfer (except in case of a bona fide sale for an adequate and full consideration in money or money’s worth), by trust or otherwise, where the enjoyment thereof was subject at the date of his death to any change through the exercise of a power (in whatever capacity exercisable) by the decedent ...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Estate tax transfer rules with 3-year power relinquishment lookback period before death",
  "declarations": [
    "transfer_date: date",
    "death_date: date",
    "power_relinquished: bool",
    "power_relinquishment_date: date"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "transfer_date < death_date",
    "(power_relinquished == True) -> (power_relinquishment_date >= death_date - Period(3, 0, 0) && power_relinquishment_date <= death_date)"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Annuities; certain proceeds of endowment and life insurance contracts
input.text_preview: (b) Exclusion ratio (1) In general Gross income does not include that part of any amount received as an annuity under an annuity, endowment, or life insurance contract which bears the same ratio to such amount as the investment in the contract (as of the annuity starting date) bears to the expected return under the contract (as of such date). (2) Exclusion limited to investment The portion of any amount received as an annuity which is excluded from gross income under paragraph (1) shall not exce...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Annuity taxation timing constraints for payments, cessation, and deductions",
  "declarations": [
    "annuity_starting_date: date",
    "amount_receipt_date: date",
    "cessation_date: date",
    "determination_date: date",
    "last_taxable_year_start: date",
    "last_taxable_year_end: date",
    "receipt_taxable_year_start: date",
    "receipt_taxable_year_end: date",
    "payments_ceased: bool",
    "deduction_to_other_persons: bool"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "amount_receipt_date >= annuity_starting_date",
    "(payments_ceased == True) -> (cessation_date > annuity_starting_date)",
    "(amount_receipt_date >= annuity_starting_date) && (amount_receipt_date < determination_date)",
    "(payments_ceased == True) -> ((cessation_date >= last_taxable_year_start) && (cessation_date <= last_taxable_year_end))",
    "last_taxable_year_end >= last_taxable_year_start",
    "last_taxable_year_end <= last_taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "(deduction_to_other_persons == True) -> ((amount_receipt_date >= receipt_taxable_year_start) && (amount_receipt_date <= receipt_taxable_year_end))",
    "receipt_taxable_year_end >= receipt_taxable_year_start",
    "receipt_taxable_year_end <= receipt_taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: First-time homebuyer credit
input.text_preview: (g) Election to treat purchase in prior year In the case of a purchase of a principal residence after December 31, 2008 , a taxpayer may elect to treat such purchase as made on December 31 of the calendar year preceding such purchase for purposes of this section (other than subsections (b)(4), (c), (f)(4)(D), and (h)).

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Election to treat residence purchase as occurring in prior year",
  "declarations": [
    "actual_purchase_date: date",
    "treated_as_date: date",
    "election_made: bool",
    "preceding_year: int"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "actual_purchase_date > Date(2008, 12, 31)",
    "preceding_year == actual_purchase_date.year - 1",
    "(election_made == True) -> (treated_as_date == Date(preceding_year, 12, 31))",
    "(election_made == False) -> (treated_as_date == actual_purchase_date)"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Losses resulting from disaster, vandalism, or malicious mischief
input.text_preview: (b) Claims (1) Period for making claim; proof No claim shall be allowed under this section unless— (A) filed within 6 months after the date on which such distilled spirits, wines, or beer were lost, rendered unmarketable, or condemned by a duly authorized official, and (B) the claimant furnishes proof satisfactory to the Secretary that the claimant— (i) was not indemnified by any valid claim of insurance or otherwise in respect of the tax, or tax and duty, on the distilled spirits, wines, or bee...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Claim filing deadlines: within 6 months of loss, or extended period if major disaster declared",
  "declarations": [
    "loss_date: date",
    "claim_filing_date: date",
    "major_disaster_declared: bool",
    "presidential_determination_date: date",
    "filing_deadline: date"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "claim_filing_date >= loss_date",
    "(major_disaster_declared == False) -> (filing_deadline == loss_date + Period(0, 6, 0))",
    "(major_disaster_declared == True) -> (filing_deadline >= loss_date + Period(0, 6, 0))",
    "(major_disaster_declared == True) -> (filing_deadline >= presidential_determination_date + Period(0, 6, 0))",
    "claim_filing_date <= filing_deadline"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Limitation on net operating loss carryforwards and certain built-in losses following ownership change
input.text_preview: (d) Pre-change loss and post-change year For purposes of this section— (1) Pre-change loss The term “pre-change loss” means— (A) any net operating loss carryforward of the old loss corporation to the taxable year ending with the ownership change or in which the change date occurs, and (B) the net operating loss of the old loss corporation for the taxable year in which the ownership change occurs to the extent such loss is allocable to the period in such year on or before the change date. Except ...

    "change_year_end: date",
    "post_change_year_end: date"

input.heading: Moving expenses
input.text_preview: (c) Conditions for allowance No deduction shall be allowed under this section unless— (1) the taxpayer’s new principal place of work— (A) is at least 50 miles farther from his former residence than was his former principal place of work, or (B) if he had no former principal place of work, is at least 50 miles from his former residence, and (2) either— (A) during the 12-month period immediately following his arrival in the general location of his new principal place of work, the taxpayer is a ful...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Moving expense deduction temporal requirements based on employment weeks after arrival",
  "declarations": [
    "arrival_date: date",
    "period_12_months_end: date",
    "period_24_months_end: date",
    "weeks_in_first_12_months: int",
    "weeks_in_first_24_months: int"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "period_12_months_end == arrival_date + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "period_24_months_end == arrival_date + Period(2, 0, 0)",
    "weeks_in_first_12_months >= 0",
    "weeks_in_first_24_months >= 0",
    "weeks_in_first_24_months >= weeks_in_first_12_months",

  ]
}
```

input.heading: Exclusion of gain from sale of principal residence
input.text_preview: (b) Limitations (1) In general The amount of gain excluded from gross income under subsection (a) with respect to any sale or exchange shall not exceed $250,000. (2) Special rules for joint returns In the case of a husband and wife who make a joint return for the taxable year of the sale or exchange of the property— (A) $500,000 Limitation for certain joint returns Paragraph (1) shall be applied by substituting “$500,000” for “$250,000” if— (i) either spouse meets the ownership requirements of s...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Temporal constraints for home sale capital gains exclusion limitations including two-year lookback rule and surviving spouse provisions",
  "declarations": [
    "sale_date: date",
    "taxable_year_start: date",
    "taxable_year_end: date",
    "prior_qualifying_sale_occurred: bool",
    "prior_sale_date: date",
    "surviving_spouse_provision_applies: bool",
    "spouse_death_date: date"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "sale_date >= taxable_year_start && sale_date <= taxable_year_end",
    "taxable_year_end >= taxable_year_start",
    "taxable_year_end <= taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "(prior_qualifying_sale_occurred == True) -> (sale_date > prior_sale_date + Period(2, 0, 0))",
    "(prior_qualifying_sale_occurred == True) -> (prior_sale_date < sale_date)",
    "(surviving_spouse_provision_applies == True) -> (sale_date <= spouse_death_date + Period(2, 0, 0))",
    "(surviving_spouse_provision_applies == True) -> (spouse_death_date < sale_date)"
  ]
}
```

{
  "description": "Health insurance penalty temporal constraints: taxable year period, failure months within taxable year, calendar year determination, and age determination timing",
  "declarations": [

    "taxable_year_end: date",
    "failure_month_start: date",

input.heading: Adjusted financial statement income
input.text_preview: (c) General adjustments (1) Statements covering different taxable years Appropriate adjustments shall be made in adjusted financial statement income in any case in which an applicable financial statement covers a period other than the taxable year. (2) Special rules for related entities (A) Consolidated financial statements If the financial results of a taxpayer are reported on the applicable financial statement for a group of entities, rules similar to the rules of section 451(b)(5) shall apply...

{
  "description": "Temporal constraints for financial statement periods, taxable years, and wireless spectrum acquisition timing",
  "declarations": [
    "financial_statement_start: date",
    "financial_statement_end: date",
    "taxable_year_start: date",
    "taxable_year_end: date",

    "year_n_plus_1_start: date",
    "year_n_plus_1_end: date",

    "qualifies_as_wireless_spectrum: bool"
  ],
  "constraints": [

    "taxable_year_end <= taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "financial_statement_end >= financial_statement_start",
    "year_n_plus_1_start > year_n_end",
    "year_n_plus_1_end >= year_n_plus_1_start",
